param.name: sellPriceMax
param.comment: Max relative price for sell offers (ship buys from station). Range: -1.0 to 1.0. Default 1.0 = no filter

param.name: buyPriceMin
param.comment: Min relative price for buy offers (ship sells to station). Range: -1.0 to 1.0. Default -1.0 = no filter

param.name: requirePlayerBuyOfferOwner
param.comment: When true, collected buy offers must be player-owned buyers (MK4 customer policy prefilter).

param.name: priorityWares
param.comment: Optional: MK3 priority wares to explicitly search for (ensures they enter the tradeable set for scoring)

param.name: bypassPlayerSellerPricing
param.comment: When true, run a supplemental player-only sell scan without relativeprice filter so player stations are purchased from regardless of price.

param.name: excludePlayerBuyers
param.comment: When true, exclude player-owned buy offers entirely (used with bypassPlayerSellerPricing to sell only to NPC factions).

param.name: sourceSellOffers
param.comment: Home-station sell offers keyed by ware for score-aware buyer cap (MK1 export).

param.name: scoreAwareBuyCap
param.comment: When true with sourceSellOffers, retain best maxOffersPerWare buyers by estimated score across full scan.

param.name: retainCheapestSellPerWare
param.comment: When true, after sell collection keep cheapest player-owned and cheapest NPC sell offers per ware under maxOffersPerWare budget.

param.name: distancePenalty
param.comment: Distance divisor for scoreAwareBuyCap estimate (matches lib.gt.tradematch sell scoring).

param.name: demandLedSupplierScan
param.comment: MK4: collect buy offers first, then limit supplier scan to demand wares only (S4).

param.name: mk4BuildStorageOnlyMode
param.comment: MK4: implicit BS-on + all ware-category toggles off — in-scope build storage buyers only.

param.name: mk4AnchorHome
param.comment: MK4 home anchor for build-storage-only scope (station or sector).

param.name: maxDistanceSell
param.comment: MK4 jumpDistanceCoverage — max gate distance from home for BS delivery buyers (0 = use maxDistance).

param.name: searchPurpose
param.comment: cache_refresh = fleet-min totalvolume for shared cache; direct_live = this ship min/max

param.name: cargoTargetPercent
param.comment: Override cargotarget percent (0 = resolve from ship/order)

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] lib.gt.live.search v6: global scratch + gtls_ensure_state resume guards'

do_if.value: this.$gtlsSearchPurpose == 'cache_refresh' and $gtlsSearchMode == 'buy_and_sell' and $gtlsUseAllWares and $gtlsHomeSector? and @$gtlsHomeSector.exists and not $gtlsRetainCheapestSellPerWare and not $gtlsUseScoreAwareBuyCap and not $gtlsRequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner and (not this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan? or not this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan)

set_value.name: this.$gtlsOfferIndexProfile
set_value.exact: 'cr|' + $gtlsMaxDistance + '|' + $gtlsSellPriceMax + '|' + $gtlsBuyPriceMin + '|' + $gtlsOwnerFilter + '|' + (if $gtlsIgnoreTradeRules then 1 else 0) + '|' + (if $gtlsIncludePlayerSellOffers then 1 else 0) + '|' + (if $gtlsIncludePlayerBuyOffers then 1 else 0) + '|' + (if $gtlsBypassPlayerSellerPricing then 1 else 0) + '|' + (if $gtlsExcludePlayerBuyers then 1 else 0) + '|' + (if $gtlsAllowIllegal then 1 else 0) + '|' + $gtlsMaxOffersPerWare

set_value.name: global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$gtlsShip}
set_value.exact: table[ $Ship = $gtlsShip, $SearchMode = $gtlsSearchMode, $BuySpaces = $gtlsBuySpaces, $SellSpaces = $gtlsSellSpaces, $HomeSector = $gtlsHomeSector, $MaxDistance = $gtlsMaxDistance, $WareBasket = $gtlsWareBasket, $AllowIllegal = $gtlsAllowIllegal, $OwnerFilter = $gtlsOwnerFilter, $IgnoreMK1Supply = $gtlsIgnoreMK1Supply, $IgnoreTradeRules = $gtlsIgnoreTradeRules, $MaxOffersPerWare = $gtlsMaxOffersPerWare, $BuildStorageReservePerWare = $gtlsBuildStorageReservePerWare, $SellPriceMax = $gtlsSellPriceMax, $BuyPriceMin = $gtlsBuyPriceMin, $IncludePlayerBuyOffers = $gtlsIncludePlayerBuyOffers, $IncludePlayerSellOffers = $gtlsIncludePlayerSellOffers, $RequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner = $gtlsRequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner, $IgnoreTradeRulesPlayerBuyOffersRequireCargoNeed = $gtlsIgnoreTradeRulesPlayerBuyOffersRequireCargoNeed, $BypassPlayerSellerPricing = $gtlsBypassPlayerSellerPricing, $RetainCheapestSellPerWare = $gtlsRetainCheapestSellPerWare, $ExcludePlayerBuyers = $gtlsExcludePlayerBuyers, $PriorityWares = $gtlsPriorityWares, $Debugchance = $gtlsDebugchance, $UseAllWares = $gtlsUseAllWares, $DistancePenalty = $gtlsDistancePenalty, $SourceSellByWare = $gtlsSourceSellByWare, $UseScoreAwareBuyCap = $gtlsUseScoreAwareBuyCap, $TopBuyOffersPerWare = $gtlsTopBuyOffersPerWare, $TopBuyScoresPerWare = $gtlsTopBuyScoresPerWare, $ScoreAwareCandidatesSeen = $gtlsScoreAwareCandidatesSeen, $SeenBuyOffers = $gtlsSeenBuyOffers, $BuyBuildStorageOffersPerWare = $gtlsBuyBuildStorageOffersPerWare, $BuildStorageBuyOffersAdded = $gtlsBuildStorageBuyOffersAdded, $YieldMs = $gtYieldMs, $BuyOffers = $buyOffers, $SellOffers = $sellOffers, $BuyOffersPerWare = $buyOffersPerWare, $SellOffersPerWare = $sellOffersPerWare, $DemandLedSupplierScan = if this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan? then this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan else false, $DemandLedSellDone = if this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone? then this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone else false, $Mk4BuildStorageOnlyMode = if $gtlsMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode? then $gtlsMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode else false, $Mk4AnchorHome = if $gtlsMk4AnchorHome? then $gtlsMk4AnchorHome else null ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': params: sellPriceMax=' + $gtlsSellPriceMax + ' buyPriceMin=' + $gtlsBuyPriceMin + ' mode=' + $gtlsSearchMode + ' buySpaces=' + $gtlsBuySpaces.count + ' sellSpaces=' + $gtlsSellSpaces.count + (if this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan? and this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan then ' demandLed=true' else '')

do_if.value: $gtlsSearchMode != 'sell_only' and $gtlsBuySpaces? and $gtlsBuySpaces.count gt 0 and (not this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan? or not this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan or (this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone? and this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone))

this.$gtlsOfferIndexEnabled? and this.$gtlsOfferIndexEnabled and $gtlsUseAllWares and global.$GT_OfferIndex? and global.$GT_OfferIndex.{$gtlsHomeSector}? and global.$GT_OfferIndex.{$gtlsHomeSector}.$Sells? and global.$GT_OfferIndex.{$gtlsHomeSector}.$Sells.{$space}?
this.$gtlsMaxBuyUnitPriceByWare? and this.$gtlsMaxBuyUnitPriceByWare.{$ware}? and $offer.unitprice gt this.$gtlsMaxBuyUnitPriceByWare.{$ware}

this.$gtlsOfferIndexEnabled? and this.$gtlsOfferIndexEnabled and $gtlsUseAllWares and not $gtlsSellFromIndex and $gtlsHomeSector? and global.$GT_OfferIndex? and global.$GT_OfferIndex.{$gtlsHomeSector}?

set_value.name: global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$gtlsShip}
set_value.exact: table[ $Ship = $gtlsShip, $SearchMode = $gtlsSearchMode, $BuySpaces = $gtlsBuySpaces, $SellSpaces = $gtlsSellSpaces, $HomeSector = $gtlsHomeSector, $MaxDistance = $gtlsMaxDistance, $WareBasket = $gtlsWareBasket, $AllowIllegal = $gtlsAllowIllegal, $OwnerFilter = $gtlsOwnerFilter, $IgnoreMK1Supply = $gtlsIgnoreMK1Supply, $IgnoreTradeRules = $gtlsIgnoreTradeRules, $MaxOffersPerWare = $gtlsMaxOffersPerWare, $BuildStorageReservePerWare = $gtlsBuildStorageReservePerWare, $SellPriceMax = $gtlsSellPriceMax, $BuyPriceMin = $gtlsBuyPriceMin, $IncludePlayerBuyOffers = $gtlsIncludePlayerBuyOffers, $IncludePlayerSellOffers = $gtlsIncludePlayerSellOffers, $RequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner = $gtlsRequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner, $IgnoreTradeRulesPlayerBuyOffersRequireCargoNeed = $gtlsIgnoreTradeRulesPlayerBuyOffersRequireCargoNeed, $BypassPlayerSellerPricing = $gtlsBypassPlayerSellerPricing, $RetainCheapestSellPerWare = $gtlsRetainCheapestSellPerWare, $ExcludePlayerBuyers = $gtlsExcludePlayerBuyers, $PriorityWares = $gtlsPriorityWares, $Debugchance = $gtlsDebugchance, $UseAllWares = $gtlsUseAllWares, $DistancePenalty = $gtlsDistancePenalty, $SourceSellByWare = $gtlsSourceSellByWare, $UseScoreAwareBuyCap = $gtlsUseScoreAwareBuyCap, $TopBuyOffersPerWare = $gtlsTopBuyOffersPerWare, $TopBuyScoresPerWare = $gtlsTopBuyScoresPerWare, $ScoreAwareCandidatesSeen = $gtlsScoreAwareCandidatesSeen, $SeenBuyOffers = $gtlsSeenBuyOffers, $BuyBuildStorageOffersPerWare = $gtlsBuyBuildStorageOffersPerWare, $BuildStorageBuyOffersAdded = $gtlsBuildStorageBuyOffersAdded, $YieldMs = $gtYieldMs, $BuyOffers = $buyOffers, $SellOffers = $sellOffers, $BuyOffersPerWare = $buyOffersPerWare, $SellOffersPerWare = $sellOffersPerWare, $DemandLedSupplierScan = if this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan? then this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan else false, $DemandLedSellDone = if this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone? then this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone else false, $Mk4BuildStorageOnlyMode = if $gtlsMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode? then $gtlsMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode else false, $Mk4AnchorHome = if $gtlsMk4AnchorHome? then $gtlsMk4AnchorHome else null ]

wait.exact: if global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch? and $ship? and global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs? then global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs * 1ms else 1ms

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': sell-offers collected=' + $sellOffers.count + ' (sellPriceMax=' + $gtlsSellPriceMax + (if $gtlsRequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner and this.$gtlsMk4PriceCapPrefilterSkipped? and this.$gtlsMk4PriceCapPrefilterSkipped gt 0 then ', mk4PriceCapPrefilterSkipped=' + this.$gtlsMk4PriceCapPrefilterSkipped else '') + ')'

do_if.value: $gtlsBypassPlayerSellerPricing and $gtlsSearchMode != 'sell_only' and $gtlsBuySpaces? and $gtlsBuySpaces.count gt 0 and $gtlsOwnerFilter != 'npc_only' and (not this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan? or not this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan or (this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone? and this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone))

wait.exact: if global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch? and $ship? and global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs? then global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs * 1ms else 1ms

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': bypassPlayerSellerPricing supplement added=' + $playerSellOffersAdded + ' player sell offers (total sell=' + $sellOffers.count + ')'

set_value.name: $offerCustomer
set_value.exact: if $offer.buyer? and @$offer.buyer.exists then @$offer.buyer else (if $offer.owner? then @$offer.owner else null)

set_value.name: global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$gtlsShip}
set_value.exact: table[ $Ship = $gtlsShip, $SearchMode = $gtlsSearchMode, $BuySpaces = $gtlsBuySpaces, $SellSpaces = $gtlsSellSpaces, $HomeSector = $gtlsHomeSector, $MaxDistance = $gtlsMaxDistance, $WareBasket = $gtlsWareBasket, $AllowIllegal = $gtlsAllowIllegal, $OwnerFilter = $gtlsOwnerFilter, $IgnoreMK1Supply = $gtlsIgnoreMK1Supply, $IgnoreTradeRules = $gtlsIgnoreTradeRules, $MaxOffersPerWare = $gtlsMaxOffersPerWare, $BuildStorageReservePerWare = $gtlsBuildStorageReservePerWare, $SellPriceMax = $gtlsSellPriceMax, $BuyPriceMin = $gtlsBuyPriceMin, $IncludePlayerBuyOffers = $gtlsIncludePlayerBuyOffers, $IncludePlayerSellOffers = $gtlsIncludePlayerSellOffers, $RequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner = $gtlsRequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner, $IgnoreTradeRulesPlayerBuyOffersRequireCargoNeed = $gtlsIgnoreTradeRulesPlayerBuyOffersRequireCargoNeed, $BypassPlayerSellerPricing = $gtlsBypassPlayerSellerPricing, $RetainCheapestSellPerWare = $gtlsRetainCheapestSellPerWare, $ExcludePlayerBuyers = $gtlsExcludePlayerBuyers, $PriorityWares = $gtlsPriorityWares, $Debugchance = $gtlsDebugchance, $UseAllWares = $gtlsUseAllWares, $DistancePenalty = $gtlsDistancePenalty, $SourceSellByWare = $gtlsSourceSellByWare, $UseScoreAwareBuyCap = $gtlsUseScoreAwareBuyCap, $TopBuyOffersPerWare = $gtlsTopBuyOffersPerWare, $TopBuyScoresPerWare = $gtlsTopBuyScoresPerWare, $ScoreAwareCandidatesSeen = $gtlsScoreAwareCandidatesSeen, $SeenBuyOffers = $gtlsSeenBuyOffers, $BuyBuildStorageOffersPerWare = $gtlsBuyBuildStorageOffersPerWare, $BuildStorageBuyOffersAdded = $gtlsBuildStorageBuyOffersAdded, $YieldMs = $gtYieldMs, $BuyOffers = $buyOffers, $SellOffers = $sellOffers, $BuyOffersPerWare = $buyOffersPerWare, $SellOffersPerWare = $sellOffersPerWare, $DemandLedSupplierScan = if this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan? then this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan else false, $DemandLedSellDone = if this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone? then this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone else false, $Mk4BuildStorageOnlyMode = if $gtlsMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode? then $gtlsMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode else false, $Mk4AnchorHome = if $gtlsMk4AnchorHome? then $gtlsMk4AnchorHome else null ]

wait.exact: if global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch? and $ship? and global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs? then global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs * 1ms else 1ms
wait.comment: Yield after MK4 completion buy-offer sector

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': MK4 single-trip completion pass added=' + $completionBuyOffersAdded + ' player buy offers (total buy=' + $buyOffers.count + ')'

do_if.value: this.$gtlsOfferIndexEnabled? and this.$gtlsOfferIndexEnabled and $gtlsUseAllWares and global.$GT_OfferIndex? and global.$GT_OfferIndex.{$gtlsHomeSector}? and global.$GT_OfferIndex.{$gtlsHomeSector}.$Buys? and global.$GT_OfferIndex.{$gtlsHomeSector}.$Buys.{$space}?

set_value.name: $gtlsBuyerObj
set_value.exact: if $offer.buyer? then @$offer.buyer else (if $offer.owner? then @$offer.owner else null)

set_value.name: $gtlsBuyerObj
set_value.exact: if $offer.buyer? then @$offer.buyer else (if $offer.owner? then @$offer.owner else null)

do_if.value: this.$gtlsOfferIndexEnabled? and this.$gtlsOfferIndexEnabled and $gtlsUseAllWares and not $gtlsBuyFromIndex and $gtlsHomeSector? and global.$GT_OfferIndex? and global.$GT_OfferIndex.{$gtlsHomeSector}?

set_value.name: global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$gtlsShip}
set_value.exact: table[ $Ship = $gtlsShip, $SearchMode = $gtlsSearchMode, $BuySpaces = $gtlsBuySpaces, $SellSpaces = $gtlsSellSpaces, $HomeSector = $gtlsHomeSector, $MaxDistance = $gtlsMaxDistance, $WareBasket = $gtlsWareBasket, $AllowIllegal = $gtlsAllowIllegal, $OwnerFilter = $gtlsOwnerFilter, $IgnoreMK1Supply = $gtlsIgnoreMK1Supply, $IgnoreTradeRules = $gtlsIgnoreTradeRules, $MaxOffersPerWare = $gtlsMaxOffersPerWare, $BuildStorageReservePerWare = $gtlsBuildStorageReservePerWare, $SellPriceMax = $gtlsSellPriceMax, $BuyPriceMin = $gtlsBuyPriceMin, $IncludePlayerBuyOffers = $gtlsIncludePlayerBuyOffers, $IncludePlayerSellOffers = $gtlsIncludePlayerSellOffers, $RequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner = $gtlsRequirePlayerBuyOfferOwner, $IgnoreTradeRulesPlayerBuyOffersRequireCargoNeed = $gtlsIgnoreTradeRulesPlayerBuyOffersRequireCargoNeed, $BypassPlayerSellerPricing = $gtlsBypassPlayerSellerPricing, $RetainCheapestSellPerWare = $gtlsRetainCheapestSellPerWare, $ExcludePlayerBuyers = $gtlsExcludePlayerBuyers, $PriorityWares = $gtlsPriorityWares, $Debugchance = $gtlsDebugchance, $UseAllWares = $gtlsUseAllWares, $DistancePenalty = $gtlsDistancePenalty, $SourceSellByWare = $gtlsSourceSellByWare, $UseScoreAwareBuyCap = $gtlsUseScoreAwareBuyCap, $TopBuyOffersPerWare = $gtlsTopBuyOffersPerWare, $TopBuyScoresPerWare = $gtlsTopBuyScoresPerWare, $ScoreAwareCandidatesSeen = $gtlsScoreAwareCandidatesSeen, $SeenBuyOffers = $gtlsSeenBuyOffers, $BuyBuildStorageOffersPerWare = $gtlsBuyBuildStorageOffersPerWare, $BuildStorageBuyOffersAdded = $gtlsBuildStorageBuyOffersAdded, $YieldMs = $gtYieldMs, $BuyOffers = $buyOffers, $SellOffers = $sellOffers, $BuyOffersPerWare = $buyOffersPerWare, $SellOffersPerWare = $sellOffersPerWare, $DemandLedSupplierScan = if this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan? then this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan else false, $DemandLedSellDone = if this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone? then this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone else false, $Mk4BuildStorageOnlyMode = if $gtlsMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode? then $gtlsMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode else false, $Mk4AnchorHome = if $gtlsMk4AnchorHome? then $gtlsMk4AnchorHome else null ]

wait.exact: if global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch? and $ship? and global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs? then global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs * 1ms else 1ms

do_if.value: not $gtlsExcludePlayerBuyers and $gtlsIncludePlayerBuyOffers and $gtlsOwnerFilter != 'npc_only' and ($gtlsIgnoreTradeRules or $gtlsIgnoreTradeRulesPlayerBuyOffersRequireCargoNeed) and $gtlsSearchMode != 'buy_only' and $gtlsSellSpaces? and $gtlsSellSpaces.count gt 0

set_value.name: $gtlsBuyerObj
set_value.exact: if $offer.buyer? then @$offer.buyer else (if $offer.owner? then @$offer.owner else null)

set_value.name: $gtlsBuyerObj
set_value.exact: if $offer.buyer? then @$offer.buyer else (if $offer.owner? then @$offer.owner else null)

wait.exact: if global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch? and $ship? and global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs? then global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs * 1ms else 1ms

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': score-aware buy cap finalized candidatesSeen=' + $gtlsScoreAwareCandidatesSeen + ' retained=' + $buyOffers.count + ' wares=' + $gtlsFinalizeWareKeys.count

'[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': buy-offers collected=' + $buyOffers.count + ' (buyPriceMin=' + $gtlsBuyPriceMin + ', buildStorageBuyOffers=' + $gtlsBuildStorageBuyOffersAdded + ', reservePerWare=' + $gtlsBuildStorageReservePerWare + (if $gtlsUseScoreAwareBuyCap then ', scoreAwareCap=true' else '') + ')'

do_if.value: this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan? and this.$gtlsDemandLedSupplierScan and $gtlsSearchMode == 'buy_and_sell' and not (this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone? and this.$gtlsDemandLedSellDone)

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': demand-led supplier scan: demandWares=' + $gtlsDemandWareBasket.count + ' from buyOffers=' + $buyOffers.count

set_value.name: $pwNames
set_value.exact: $pwNames + (if $pn gt 1 then ', ' else '') + (if $pnw? and $pnw != null then @$pnw.name else '?')

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': priority ware ' + (if $pw? and $pw != null then @$pw.name else '?') + ' SKIPPED (illegal, allowIllegal=false)'

do_if.value: this.$gtlsMaxBuyUnitPriceByWare? and this.$gtlsMaxBuyUnitPriceByWare.{$pw}? and $offer.unitprice gt this.$gtlsMaxBuyUnitPriceByWare.{$pw}

wait.exact: if global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch? and $ship? and global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs? then global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs * 1ms else 1ms

set_value.name: $gtlsBuyerObj
set_value.exact: if $offer.buyer? then @$offer.buyer else (if $offer.owner? then @$offer.owner else null)

wait.exact: if global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch? and $ship? and global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs? then global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs * 1ms else 1ms

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': priority ware ' + (if $pw? and $pw != null then @$pw.name else '?') + ': sellOffers=' + $pwSellCount + ' buyOffers=' + $pwBuyCount

wait.exact: if global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch? and $ship? and global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs? then global.$GT_LiveSearchScratch.{$ship}.$YieldMs * 1ms else 1ms

debug_text.text: '[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': priority-ware pass complete: added sellOffers=' + ($sellOffers.count - $pwSellBefore) + ' buyOffers=' + ($buyOffers.count - $pwBuyBefore) + ' (total sell=' + $sellOffers.count + ' buy=' + $buyOffers.count + ')'

'[GT-LiveSearch] ' + $gtlsShip.idcode + ': buildStorageOnly direct BS buy scan added=' + $gtlsBsoDirectBuyAdded + ' buyers=' + $gtlsBsoBuyersFound + ' stationsScanned=' + $gtlsBsoStationsScanned + ' coverageMax=' + $gtlsBsoCoverageMax + 'j'

set_value.name: $gtlsBsoSeller
set_value.exact: if $gtlsBsoSellOffer.seller? then @$gtlsBsoSellOffer.seller else (if $gtlsBsoSellOffer.owner? then @$gtlsBsoSellOffer.owner else null)

set_value.name: $gtlsBsoBuyer
set_value.exact: if $gtlsBsoBuyOffer.buyer? then @$gtlsBsoBuyOffer.buyer else (if $gtlsBsoBuyOffer.owner? then @$gtlsBsoBuyOffer.owner else null)

return.value: table[ $SellOffers = $sellOffers, $BuyOffers = $buyOffers, $SellOfferCount = $sellOffers.count, $BuyOfferCount = $buyOffers.count, $SellWaresFound = $sellOffersPerWare.keys.count, $BuyWaresFound = $buyOffersPerWare.keys.count, $OfferIndexHits = if this.$gtlsOfferIndexHits? then this.$gtlsOfferIndexHits else 0, $OfferIndexMisses = if this.$gtlsOfferIndexMisses? then this.$gtlsOfferIndexMisses else 0 ]
